utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Where there is no fear of commitment .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Do we have any thoughts here ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Well , I have never been through the tunnel myself , cause as I understand it , you are not allowed to go through with more than one girl in the car , right .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: But , it seems to me it is pretty much like anything else , you know , face your fear .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: It have a fear of heights , you go to the top of the building !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: If you are afraid of bugs ... get a bug .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: In this case , you have a fear of commitment , so I say you go in there and be the most committed guy there ever was .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Oh , yeah . Go for it man , jump off the high dive , stare down the barrel of the gun , pee into the wind !

emotion_cause.span: 12_Go for it man , jump off the high dive , stare down the barrel of the gun , pee into the wind !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Yeah , Joe , I assure you if I am staring down the barrel of a gun , I am pretty much peeing every which way .

emotion_cause.span: 13_if I am staring down the barrel of a gun , I am pretty much peeing every which way .
